item.text: {"sites":[],"complete":false,"unresolved":["Search output is broad because several non-JsonDeserializer classes also expose deserialize. I am narrowing this to methods on the JsonDeserializer hierarchy and invocations whose receiver is a JsonDeserializer-valued field/local."]}

{"sites":[],"complete":false,"unresolved":["I have the candidate declaration set. Now I am reading the call-site clusters in core deserialization code to separate JsonDeserializer invocations from SettableBeanProperty/TokenBuffer helper methods with the same name."]}

item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
import re, pathlib
root=pathlib.Path('.')
files=list(root.rglob('*.java'))
# crude comment strip preserving newlines
def strip_comments(s):
    s=re.sub(r'/\\*.*?\\*/', lambda m:'\\n'*m.group(0).count('\\n'), s, flags=re.S)
    s=re.sub(r'//.*','',s)
    return s
for path in files:
    s=path.read_text(errors='ignore')
    t=strip_comments(s)
    lines=t.splitlines()
    class_stack=[] # (name, depth)
    method_stack=[] # (name, depth)
    depth=0
    pending=''
    for i,line in enumerate(lines,1):
        # pop before line? if depth is lower after previous line
        while class_stack and depth <= class_stack[-1][1]: class_stack.pop()
        while method_stack and depth <= method_stack[-1][1]: method_stack.pop()
        sig=(pending+' '+line.strip()).strip()
        cm=re.search(r'\\b(class|interface|enum)\\s+(\\w+)(?:\\s+extends\\s+([\\w\\.]+))?', sig)
        if cm and '{' in line:
            class_stack.append((cm.group(2), depth))
            pending=''
        # method if has parens and {, exclude if/for/switch/catch/new
        mm=re.search(r'(?:public|protected|private|static|final|abstract|synchronized|native|\\s)+[\\w<>\\[\\]\\.?]+\\s+(\\w+)\\s*\\((["'^;{}]*)'"\\)\\s*(?:throws ["'^{]+)?'"\\{', sig)
        if mm and mm.group(1) not in {'if','for','while','switch','catch'}:
            method_stack.append((mm.group(1), depth))
            pending=''
        if 'deserialize' in line and ('.deserialize' in line or re.search(r'\\bdeserialize\\s*\\(', line)):
            sym='.'.join([c[0] for c in class_stack]+([method_stack[-1][0]] if method_stack else []))
            print(f\"{path}:{i}:{sym}:{line.strip()}\")
        if line.strip() and not line.strip().startswith('@'):
            if ('(' in line and '{' not in line and ';' not in line) or pending:
                pending=(pending+' '+line.strip())[-500:]
            else:
                pending=''
        depth += line.count('{')-line.count('}')
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
import re, pathlib
root=pathlib.Path('.')
files=list(root.rglob('*.java'))
# crude comment strip preserving newlines
def strip_comments(s):
    s=re.sub(r'/\\*.*?\\*/', lambda m:'\\n'*m.group(0).count('\\n'), s, flags=re.S)
    s=re.sub(r'//.*','',s)
    return s
for path in files:
    s=path.read_text(errors='ignore')
    t=strip_comments(s)
    lines=t.splitlines()
    class_stack=[] # (name, depth)
    method_stack=[] # (name, depth)
    depth=0
    pending=''
    for i,line in enumerate(lines,1):
        # pop before line? if depth is lower after previous line
        while class_stack and depth <= class_stack[-1][1]: class_stack.pop()
        while method_stack and depth <= method_stack[-1][1]: method_stack.pop()
        sig=(pending+' '+line.strip()).strip()
        cm=re.search(r'\\b(class|interface|enum)\\s+(\\w+)(?:\\s+extends\\s+([\\w\\.]+))?', sig)
        if cm and '{' in line:
            class_stack.append((cm.group(2), depth))
            pending=''
        # method if has parens and {, exclude if/for/switch/catch/new
        mm=re.search(r'(?:public|protected|private|static|final|abstract|synchronized|native|\\s)+[\\w<>\\[\\]\\.?]+\\s+(\\w+)\\s*\\((["'^;{}]*)'"\\)\\s*(?:throws ["'^{]+)?'"\\{', sig)
        if mm and mm.group(1) not in {'if','for','while','switch','catch'}:
            method_stack.append((mm.group(1), depth))
            pending=''
        if 'deserialize' in line and ('.deserialize' in line or re.search(r'\\bdeserialize\\s*\\(', line)):
            sym='.'.join([c[0] for c in class_stack]+([method_stack[-1][0]] if method_stack else []))
            print(f\"{path}:{i}:{sym}:{line.strip()}\")
        if line.strip() and not line.strip().startswith('@'):
            if ('(' in line and '{' not in line and ';' not in line) or pending:
                pending=(pending+' '+line.strip())[-500:]
            else:
                pending=''
        depth += line.count('{')-line.count('}')
PY"
